## Recommended Actions

1. Move all flagged files to `/graveyard/PII/`
2. Add paths to `.gitignore`
3. Generate synthetic replacements where needed
4. Re-run this scanner to verify cleanup
5. Use `git filter-repo` to purge history if needed
